subject: FW: Nadia progress report
body:
See below..

I am calling Susan now for more information

 

Rich Kahn

New York Strategy Group LLC

457 Madison Avenue, 4th Floor

New York, NY 10021

tel 212-891-6430

fax 212-750-2408

cell 917-414-7584



 

From: Susana Simonpietri [mailto:ssimonpietri@zeffdesign.com] 
Sent: Wednesday, March 19, 2008 3:28 PM
To: Rich Kahn
Subject: RE: Nadia progress report

 

Rich,

I tried to ring you but the lines were busy. 

Please let me know if there is something in specific you would like to
discuss.

I just spoke to Nadia and went over the outstanding issues. The GC is
installing round one of the millwork today. The glass sample provided by
the GC is being forwarded to Nadia right now from our offices (as she no
longer had her sample for review). It will be up to her to make the
final selection on the glass.

 

Thank you,

Susana

 

Susana Simonpietri

ssimonpietri@zeffdesign.com <mailto:ssimonpietri@zeffdesign.com> 

 

zeffdesign

 

515 West 20th St, 4W

New York,  NY  10011

 

P. 212.580.7090 x238

F. 212.580.7181

www.zeffdesign.com

From: Rich Kahn [mailto:rkahn@nysgmail.com] 
Sent: Wednesday, March 19, 2008 2:44 PM
To: Susana Simonpietri
Subject: RE: Nadia progress report

 

Can you please call me to discuss

Thank you

 

Rich Kahn

New York Strategy Group LLC

457 Madison Avenue, 4th Floor

New York, NY 10021

tel 212-891-6430

fax 212-750-2408

cell 917-414-7584

 

From: Susana Simonpietri [mailto:ssimonpietri@zeffdesign.com] 
Sent: Tuesday, February 05, 2008 5:58 PM
To: nadja2102@yahoo.com
Cc: OSSA1@aol.com; Lesley Groff; Rich Kahn; Catherine Kidder; Alan A.
Barr
Subject: Nadia progress report

 

Hello Nadia,

 

The GC has given me a written progress report with completion dates for
the items I requested information on. Please the answers and dates
below. I already addressed my concerns of time management to Anthony
when we met earlier this week, but if you have any concerns on any of
the deliverables please speak to Anthony as he is the direct line for
the GC.

 

1. Millwork - Kitchen and office plus the island to be installed
February 29.

 

2. Millwork for all other spaces will be built as a second phase (and
has not yet been commenced), it is estimated to be installed by end of
March or early April.

  

3. The entry door and the balcony door will remain as existing and be
refinished.

  

4. Kitchen tops and back splash - As soon as kitchen millwork is
installed, the stone company will measure right away.

 

5. The ACs are all delivered.

 

6. Balcony flooring - February 8 to be completed. 

 

7. Balcony divider - no design yet. Nadia- please let me know if you
have thoughts on what you would like this to look like.

  

8. Bath wall finish - needs to be reworked. Architectural drawings were
not properly read and stone needs to be removed from a part of the walls
to fix problem. 

 

9. - Bathroom fixtures - Feb. 11 ( tub, medicine cabinet and Duravit
cabinets installed). Tub was improperly installed, and needs to be re
worked by GC.

 

10. Bathroom glass divider - order has not been placed. Must add 12-16
weeks after order is placed.

 

11. Bathroom lighting - waiting for delivery for the extra light
fixtures that were added. Wiring completed for these lights and upon
delivery this will be installed in one day.

 

12. Kitchen glass divider - This item has not been ordered yet.

 

13. Shower trough - Item has not been ordered yet. No date has been
provided for item.

 

14. The GC needs information from you on the mirror behind the sofa in
the living room. Do you want the mirror to go floor to ceiling?

 

This breakdown currently leaves us at a date of millwork to be completed
early April, and the glass partition installed at the end of May 2008.

 

Please let me know if you have any questions or concerns.

Thanks,

Susana

 

Susana Simonpietri

ssimonpietri@zeffdesign.com <mailto:ssimonpietri@zeffdesign.com> 

 

zeffdesign

 

515 West 20th St, 4W

New York,  NY  10011

 

P. 212.580.7090 x238

F. 212.580.7181

www.zeffdesign.com

From: Susana Simonpietri [mailto:ssimonpietri@zeffdesign.com]
Sent: Tuesday, February 05, 2008 5:58 PM
To: nadja2102@yahoo.com
Cc: OSSA1@aol.com; Lesley Groff; Rich Kahn; Catherine Kidder; Alan A. Barr
Subject: Nadia progress report

 

Hello Nadia,

 

The GC has given me a written progress report with completion dates for the items I requested information on. Please the answers and dates below. I already addressed my concerns of time management to Anthony when we met earlier this week, but if you have any concerns on any of the deliverables please speak to Anthony as he is the direct line for the GC.

 

1. Millwork - Kitchen and office plus the island to be installed February 29.

 

2. Millwork for all other spaces will be built as a second phase (and has not yet been commenced), it is estimated to be installed by end of March or early April.

  

3. The entry door and the balcony door will remain as existing and be refinished.

  

4. Kitchen tops and back splash - As soon as kitchen millwork is installed, the stone company will measure right away.

 

5. The ACs are all delivered.

 

6. Balcony flooring - February 8 to be completed.

 

7. Balcony divider - no design yet. Nadia- please let me know if you have thoughts on what you would like this to look like.

  

8. Bath wall finish – needs to be reworked. Architectural drawings were not properly read and stone needs to be removed from a part of the walls to fix problem.

 

9. - Bathroom fixtures - Feb. 11 ( tub, medicine cabinet and Duravit cabinets installed). Tub was improperly installed, and needs to be re worked by GC.

 

10. Bathroom glass divider – order has not been placed. Must add 12-16 weeks after order is placed.

 

11. Bathroom lighting - waiting for delivery for the extra light fixtures that were added. Wiring completed for these lights and upon delivery this will be installed in one day.

 

12. Kitchen glass divider - This item has not been ordered yet.

 

13. Shower trough – Item has not been ordered yet. No date has been provided for item.

 

14. The GC needs information from you on the mirror behind the sofa in the living room. Do you want the mirror to go floor to ceiling?

 

This breakdown currently leaves us at a date of millwork to be completed early April, and the glass partition installed at the end of May 2008.

 

Please let me know if you have any questions or concerns.

Thanks,

Susana

 

Susana Simonpietri

ssimonpietri@zeffdesign.com

 

zeffdesign

 

515 West 20th St, 4W

New York,  NY  10011

 

P. 212.580.7090 x238

F. 212.580.7181

www.zeffdesign.com
